hero.title: Together Forever
hero.subtitle: We invite you to celebrate our wedding

blessings.title: Divine Blessings

ganesh.name: Lord Ganesha
ganesh.shloka: वक्रतुण्ड महाकाय सूर्यकोटि समप्रभ। निर्विघ्नं कुरु मे देव सर्वकार्येषु सर्वदा॥
ganesh.meaning: O Lord Ganesha of curved trunk and mighty form, whose brilliance equals a million suns — remove all obstacles from my path, always and in everything.

lakshmi.name: Goddess Lakshmi
lakshmi.shloka: सर्वमङ्गलमाङ्गल्ये शिवे सर्वार्थसाधिके। शरण्ये त्र्यम्बके गौरि नारायणि नमोऽस्तु ते॥
lakshmi.meaning: O Goddess, the most auspicious of all that is auspicious, fulfiller of all desires, refuge of all — O Gauri, we bow to you.

blessings.subtitle: We begin this sacred journey under the divine blessings of Lord Ganesha and Goddess Lakshmi
